input:
Anyone who met him risked being bewitched, they claimed. Evil Tactics Backfire The Quraysh’s campaign was certainly successful. Nobody wanted to learn about Islam in that pilgrimage season. All tribes pledged their support to the attitude of the elders of the Quraysh in trying to contain the problem they faced. The success, however, was short-lived. Those very people who listened to the warnings and thought they were wise to avoid Muhammad and his followers carried the news to their people as they went back.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 9: Misrepresentation

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 9: Misrepresentation

characters.name: Quraysh Elder
characters.appearance: Middle-aged, medium complexion, stout build, prominent nose, dark beard. Wearing simple yet dignified white thobe with dark brown cloak over shoulders, wrapped turban with tail hanging loose. Black leather sandals.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 40s, average build, modest posture. Wearing simple white thobe with dark brown cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible.

characters.name: Islamic Follower
characters.appearance: Young adult, light olive skin, lean build, dark hair and beard. Wearing simple off-white thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind, determined eyes, upright shoulders.

output.moral_lesson: Backbiting and spreading false news can have severe consequences. It is always better to seek the truth and to be honest in our words and actions.
output.narrative_text: The Quraysh elders were successful in spreading fear about Prophet Muhammad and Islam. However, their efforts only lasted for a short time as their own people began to spread the news of Islam to others.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, Islamic follower shown with full face. Quraysh elder shown with full face, dignified look.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of a Makkah mud-brick home. A Quraysh elder in simple white thobe and dark brown cloak, standing outside with a serious expression, looking at a young adult in off-white thobe and brown cloak, who has a determined look on his face. In the background, a group of people in traditional Arabian clothing are seen in the distance, walking away. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
